packets.scope: Give the main menu a semantic color system (one primary CTA, neutral secondary, red destructive)
packets.guidance: Replace the rainbow per-button hues with: one accent for the primary action, neutral slate for the rest, red reserved for destructive/exit. Reuse existing Tailwind tokens; do not change layout or button behavior.

packets.scope: Cap town bridge over-generation by typology (mirror dockCapForTypology)
packets.guidance: findBridges seats a bridge at every river/ward crossing with no cap. Add a bridgeCapForTypology (hamlet/village 1, town 2, city/capital 3) and a cap pass keeping the K crossings nearest town centre; merge crossings within a span-width. Mirror the existing dock-cap approach in the same file. NOTE: `after` here is only to demo dep-gating — real waves sequence only where packets truly depend on each other. Agent must be worker-dispatchable per agents.json (gemini is deprecated and now rejected).
